label: Booking Call-to-Action
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for a clear booking conversion path (table reservation, clinic appointment, hair-salon slot). Renders a prominent CTA that either opens a phone tel: link, an external booking provider URL (Caspeco, Bokadirekt, Resmio, BookEden, Calendly) or a mailto: fallback. NO third-party API integration — this is presentational only; the operator pastes their booking URL in project-input. Hard booking dossiers (Caspeco-api, Bokadirekt-api) are planned imports for a future sprint.
